name: eh-investigator-agent
description: Web chat interface for an ExtraHop investigation agent, backed by the Pi coding agent or Claude Code

scripts.setup:python: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:weasyprint: (/opt/homebrew/bin/brew install weasyprint || /usr/local/bin/brew install weasyprint || brew install weasyprint) && npm run setup:python
